CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE materialized_view_table (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_test_table TO materialized_view_table AS SELECT id, name FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT count(*) FROM system.dropped_tables WHERE table = 'test_table';
CREATE TABLE nested_query_table (id UInt32, parent_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id FROM nested_query_table WHERE parent_id IN (SELECT id FROM nested_query_table WHERE parent_id = 0);
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id UInt32, group_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE join_table (group_id UInt32, group_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY group_id;
INSERT INTO join_table (group_id, group_name) VALUES (1, 'Group A'), (2, 'Group B');
SELECT c.id, j.group_name FROM complex_table AS c JOIN join_table AS j ON c.group_id = j.group_id;
CREATE TABLE unique_table (id UInt32 PRIMARY KEY, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
